creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Mon Jul 29 11:41:33 2013
New Revision: 323882
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323882

Log:
  devel/py-lxml: update to 3.2.3
  
  - Update to 3.2.3
  - Use PORTDOCS instead of pkg-plist
  - Unmute install docs command
  - Take maintainership
  
  Changes: http://lxml.de/3.2/changes-3.2.3.html
  
  PR:		ports/180910
  Submitted by:	wg (myself)
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile
  head/devel/py-lxml/distinfo
  head/devel/py-lxml/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile	Mon Jul 29 11:30:33 2013	(r323881)
+++ head/devel/py-lxml/Makefile	Mon Jul 29 11:41:33 2013	(r323882)
@@ -2,12 +2,12 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	lxml
-PORTVERSION=	3.1.0
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.3
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
-MAINTAINER=	gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
+MAINTAINER=	wg@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Pythonic binding for the libxml2 and libxslt libraries
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
@@ -17,16 +17,12 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	xml2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/l
 
 # Python3 ready
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
-PLIST_SUB+=	PORTVERSION=${PORTVERSION} PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO=${PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO}
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+PYEASYINSTALL_ARCHDEP=	yes
 
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-${PORTNAME}
-
-PORTDOCS=	CHANGES.txt \
-		CREDITS.txt \
-		LICENSES.txt \
-		TODO.txt \
-		README.rst
+PORTDOCS=	*
+DOCS_FILES=	CHANGES.txt CREDITS.txt TODO.txt README.rst
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
@@ -37,7 +33,7 @@ post-install:
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${DOCS_FILES:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${DOCSDIR}
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} doc ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
